reasons: Read endpoints /api/offers and /api/offers/filter-options return 200 via plain stdlib HTTP (verified by curl).
scout.pointhound.com/places/search returns 200 via plain stdlib HTTP.

Only /flights (search-create endpoint, NOT in the printed CLI's API surface) is Cloudflare-gated; that surface is moved to a hand-written novel command and does not affect runtime for the spec endpoints.

details.shape: GET endpoints with query-string params; response top-level is {data:[], count:N} for collections.
details.id_prefix_convention: Stable prefixes: pep_*, prp_*, pto_*, aln_*, apt_*, src_*, seg_*, off_*, ofs_*

protections.label: cloudflare
notes: Cloudflare in front of pointhound.com. Blocks direct /flights POST with 403 + bot-protection HTML.
Read endpoints (/api/offers, /api/offers/filter-options) pass through Cloudflare cleanly via stdlib HTTP — no challenge.
/flights (search-create) requires cf_clearance cookie or live Chrome session; modeled as a hand-written novel command, not a generated spec endpoint.

candidate_commands.rationale: Primary read endpoint; verified replayable anonymously.
Filter facets for a given search session; verified replayable anonymously.
Airport/city autocomplete with deal-aware ranking (cross-domain — hand-written novel command).

warnings.label: search_create_not_modeled_in_spec
notes: The Pointhound search-create endpoint (POST /flights?q=<base64-protobuf>) is Cloudflare-gated and intentionally omitted from the printed CLI's spec. It will be implemented as a hand-written novel command that reproduces the protobuf encoding and uses imported clearance cookies.

warnings.label: supabase_user_endpoints_not_modeled
notes: Supabase RPCs at db.pointhound.com/rest/v1/rpc/* (e.g. get_user_with_subscription) are auth-gated by a per-session JWT. v1 of the CLI does not include these; they can be added as hand-written novel commands if user demand surfaces.
